query: which days did I solve graph problems on leetcode
expected_to_pass_with: value-level metadata matching (map 'graph problems' -> leetcodeTopic=Graphs) or LLMQueryAnalyzer
rationale: These daily notes carry leetcodeTopic=Graphs in metadata, but their chunk content is only the weekday title, so vector search cannot match. The answer lives entirely in the payload. Verified: 0/5 retrieved today.
Both notes have leetcodeTopic=Backtracking in metadata only; content is just the weekday. Verified: 0/2 retrieved today.

query: what did I work on during the week of July 13
expected_to_pass_with: date-range filter operator + temporal query analysis (LLMQueryAnalyzer)
rationale: Expected daily notes have dates 2026-07-13..2026-07-19 in metadata. The analyzer only supports exact-date equals, and content is title-only, so vector fails. Verified: only 1/6 retrieved today (at rank 8, outside top-5).

query: notes about preparing for the intra team AI hackathon demo
expected_to_pass_with: keyword/BM25 search over metadata text, or indexing property values into the searchable content
rationale: The 'notes' property of this entry says 'Prepared for Intra team demo of AI Hackathon', but property text is not embedded, so vector search misses it. Verified: not retrieved today.

rationale: The personalWin property is 'Complete Story 4', but it is metadata only and not embedded; content is title-only. Verified: not retrieved today.
